properties.description: Upload pipeline MUST accept files up to 500 MB via chunked transfer without timeout.
properties.rationale: Derived from BRQ-001 (file size limit) and SystemContext constraint on handling 300-500 MB files.

properties.description: Transcription and protocol generation MUST run asynchronously (job-based); UI MUST surface job progress without blocking.
properties.rationale: Large file processing and external ASR/LLM latency make synchronous execution infeasible (SystemContext).

properties.description: No processing-time SLA at MVP - best-effort delivery; long-running jobs are acceptable.
properties.rationale: Explicit non-SLA per BRQ-019; recorded so future readers do not infer a performance budget.

properties.description: System MUST support Russian and English throughout (UI, ASR language hint, LLM prompts, error messages).
properties.rationale: Derived from BRQ-004 and SystemContext language constraint.

properties.description: Recordings MUST persist in durable object storage (EXT-04) until both Transcript and Protocol artifacts are produced.
properties.rationale: Derived from BRQ-020 retention rule; necessary for async pipeline durability.

properties.description: Protocol canonical format is Markdown; PDF export is transient (re-rendered on demand, not persisted).
properties.rationale: Derived from BRQ-017 (PDF transient) and BRQ-018 (Markdown canonical).

properties.description: MVP runs without authentication or multi-tenancy; all artifacts treated as owned by the uploader within a single trust boundary.
properties.rationale: Per SystemContext out-of-scope and single active role (ROL-01 Author).

properties.description: Job failures MUST be surfaced to the user with a human-readable error_reason; jobs in terminal states (succeeded/failed) are immutable.
properties.rationale: Derived from BRQ-009 (immutable terminal states) and BRQ-010 (failure recorded with reason).

properties.description: ASSUMPTION: One concurrent user session at MVP - one video processed at a time per user; multi-user/parallel-job scaling design deferred.
properties.rationale: Per SystemContext assumption 'One video at a time per user session; queue/parallelism design TBD'. Revisit when multi-user scope is added.

properties.description: Meeting catalog MUST sort meetings by updated_at descending.
